title: macrotyloma axillare
intro: Macrotyloma axillare, also known as Horse gram or Macrotyloma, is a species of legume native to the Indian subcontinent. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. It is believed to have several health benefits, including lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood sugar levels, and improving digestion. Macrotyloma axillare can be prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or capsule, and is often consumed as a supplement in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
